text_block_list.name: Monólogo
text_block_list.text:
Matikanefukukitaru drags me off by<n>the hand one
day.

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text:
Trainer, today we're going mountain<n>climbing. I
can't move mountains, but<n>I can sure move these
legs!
choice_data_list:
Why are we going mountain climbing all of a
sudden?

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text:
Well you see, I heard something<n>through the
grapevine.

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text:
If you dial a certain phone number<n>from a mystical
spot, you can earn<n>yourself some good luck...
allegedly!

So, my plan is to scale this famous<n>spiritual
mountain and call that<n>number!

Let's get to it! Neither rocks nor roots<n>are going to
stop me!

text_block_list.name: Monólogo
text_block_list.text:
We head up the mountain, though it<n>turns out it's
not rocks or roots that<n>we have to worry about.

text_block_list.name: Ghost
text_block_list.text:
Mwahaha! So you dare to show your<n>face! You
will not leave this place<n>alive!
Save meee... Please, save meee...

text_block_list.name: Monólogo
text_block_list.text:
Ignoring the horrifying wailing, we<n>trek onward.
This certainly is a<n>spiritual mountain... in the sense
that it<n>seems to be full of spirits.

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text:
You're looking pretty pale, Trainer.<n>Running low on
oxygen?

Don't hear what? Oh, the birds? They<n>sound kinda
cute, huh? Chirp chirp!
choice_data_list: You're not picking up on any spirits?
You're not picking up on any spirits?

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text: Spirits? Maybe... Maybe not. I can't<n>really tell...

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text:
No use sweating the details though!<n>Just go with
the flow!

text_block_list.name: Monólogo
text_block_list.text:
As crazy for all things spiritual as she<n>is, it
doesn't look like she has even a<n>hint of a sixth
sense.

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text: Phew. All right, I guess this spot will<n>do.

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text:
Let's not waste any time. Now,<n>where's that
lucky number?

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text:
M-my goodness! Just as I was<n>getting ready to
dial, my phone<n>started ringing!

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text:
Trainer! What if this call is coming<n>from the lucky
number?

Hm, maybe it's best to pick up? We<n>are on a
lucky mountain, after all. We<n>can't get any unlucky
calls here.

text_block_list.name: Monólogo
text_block_list.text:
I'm not as optimistic, seeing what's<n>been lurking
up here. Time to make a<n>decision.
choice_data_list: Go ahead and pick it up.
I don't think you should answer...

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text:
Okay! Hehe, I guess the owner of this<n>lucky
number just couldn't resist<n>giving me a ring.

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text: Hi, is this Luck E. Pearson speaking?

text_block_list.name: Taiki Shuttle
text_block_list.text: No, this is Taiki Shuttle.

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text:
Oh, it's you, Taiki... My phone shows<n>this as an
unknown number. Are you<n>using a pay phone or
something?

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text:
You see, I was just about to call this<n>number that
brings you happiness.

text_block_list.name: Taiki Shuttle
text_block_list.text:
A number that brings you happiness?<n>The heck is
that? Wait...

You sure you ain't got your boots on<n>backwards?
'Cause I've only heard<n>of numbers that'll curse
ya if ya call<n>'em. Hehe...

Cursed numbers... Really? Wait...<n>Could it be that I
heard wrong?!

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text: T-Taiki, I-I'm gonna hang up now!

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text: Trainer... This can't be...
choice_data_list: I think you got it wrong.
I think you got it wrong.

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text: Eeeyikes! I don't want to be cursed!<n>Save meee!

text_block_list.name: Monólogo
text_block_list.text:
Matikanefukukitaru hurtles down the<n>mountain at
a pace that would leave a<n>marathon runner pale
and wheezy.

text_block_list.name: Taiki Shuttle
text_block_list.text: Howdy, you two. Where were you<n>guys?

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text:
What do you mean? I told you before<n>when we
were talking on the phone.

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text: Anyway, thanks for the heads-up!

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text:
If you hadn't told me about that<n>cursed number
thing, I would've<n>been in a real pickle.

text_block_list.name: Taiki Shuttle
text_block_list.text:
What heads-up? What're you talking<n>about? We
didn't talk on the phone!

You know what I'm talking about,<n>silly! You called
me earlier... on a pay...<n>phone...

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text:
But why would you do that when<n>you've got your
own phone right...<n>there? Oh...

text_block_list.name: Monólogo
text_block_list.text:
Just who was it that called? Whoever<n>it was, all
that running around on the<n>mountain seems to
have done<n>Fukukitaru some good.
But, why? I don't see any reason not<n>to answer...

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text: Wait! That sound...

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text: Hey, my screen's cracked!

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text:
That can't be a good sign... I'm<n>sensing that
something bad is about<n>to happen...

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text: Wh-wh-wh-what if this is...

text_block_list.name: Monólogo
text_block_list.text:
I tell her about all the sinister things I<n>saw on the
mountain.
Ugwah! I-I had no idea! Eek,<n>somebody heeelp!

text_block_list.name: Monólogo
text_block_list.text:
Matikanefukukitaru books it down the<n>mountain
as fast as she can.

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text:
Trainer, listen to this. I actually talked<n>it over with
Taiki afterwards...

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text:
Apparently, that phone number<n>wasn't lucky at all.
It was cursed.
choice_data_list: Did your phone take the hit for you?

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text: Looks like it.

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text:
Ohhh, thank you, my sweet phone.<n>May you rest
in perfect peace. And<n>also...

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text:
May your repairs go quickly. It's<n>really
inconvenient without you.

text_block_list.name: Monólogo
text_block_list.text:
I guess she's going to pretend her<n>phone isn't
cursed and keep using it.
